summary: KalkMate.png — main product hero image showing an Esperanza electronic calculator with 'KalkMate' branding displayed on its dot-matrix LCD; used as the primary marketing visual for the KalkMate product on the website.

nodes.label: KalkMate.png
nodes.description: Main product hero image for KalkMate. Photograph (studio shot on white background) of an Esperanza-branded silver/black 12-digit electronic desktop calculator with solar cell, MC/MR/M-/M+ memory keys, arithmetic keys and a dot-matrix LCD screen displaying the word 'KalkMate' in pixel font. Serves as the primary product photo / marketing hero visual presenting the KalkMate AI-assisted calculator concept on the project website's public assets.

edges.reason: Both are KalkMate brand marketing/product imagery in the website public assets directory.
Both are KalkMate product hero marketing images sharing the same product subject.
